# Copilot Workspace Instructions

This repository is the active working source for the Development Station Power Supply project.

## Current project direction
- Bring-up first, redesign later
- Use the existing built hardware as the learning baseline
- Front-panel display work now lives in this repo
- Evaluate two display paths in parallel:
  - existing custom front-panel hardware already designed
  - Elecrow CrowPanel Advance 4.3 inch HMI display
- Do not assume a new display redesign is active unless the repo docs are updated to say so

## Before answering new chats in this workspace
Review these files first for current context:
- README.md
- docs/display-project/README.md
- docs/GPIO_PINOUT.md when front-panel signals are discussed
- docs/USB_HUB_CHANGE_TRACKER.md when USB hub hardware is discussed

## Working style for this repo
- Prefer continuing from the current repo state rather than relying on handoff prose
- Treat the repo docs as the source of truth
- Keep updates grounded in what is actually committed
- When project direction changes, update the main repo docs so future sessions can resume cleanly
